native_task_tool.file: NO_CUSTOM_TASK_TOOL — OpenCode provides 'task' natively via @opencode-ai/plugin SDK
native_task_tool.registration: The native 'task' tool is NOT registered by Hivemind. It is built into the OpenCode runtime. Hivemind only hooks into its lifecycle via tool.execute.before and tool.execute.after.
lifecycle: 1. tool.execute.before hook fires — tool-before-guard.ts detects toolName === 'task'
2. SessionTracker.handleToolExecuteBefore() registers pending dispatch in PendingDispatchRegistry
3. ToolDelegation.pollForChildSessions() fires async polling (5 attempts × 200ms) to discover child session via client.session.children()
4. Native task tool executes in OpenCode runtime — creates child session, dispatches prompt
5. tool.execute.after hook fires — SessionTracker.handleToolExecuteAfter() classifies session (child/main/unknownSub)
6. For child sessions: ToolDelegation.recordChildToolJourney() + recordChildTaskDelegation() create child .json file
7. For child sessions: hierarchy-manifest.json, session-index, project-index all updated
8. chat.message hook fires for parent session — MessageCapture captures delegation result
9. session.idle event fires for child session — SessionIdleHandler marks child 'completed'

session_tracker_integration_points.tool_execute_after: src/features/session-tracker/index.ts:312-316 — for child sessions, calls recordChildToolJourney() and recordChildTaskDelegation()
session_tracker_integration_points.chat_message: src/plugin.ts:548-563 — captures delegation result from parent session messages

files: src/features/session-tracker/persistence/ — atomic-write, child-writer, session-writer, hierarchy-index, hierarchy-manifest, session-index-writer, project-index-writer, pending-dispatch-registry, retry-queue
events_recorded: session.created — creates .md file, registers in project index, copies forked children
session.idle — marks session 'completed', captures lastMessage, backfills child turns
session.error — marks session 'error', records error journey entry
message.updated — tracks assistant response text in LastMessageCapture cache
tool.execute.after — captures tool metadata (skill name, read path, task delegation, etc.)
tool.execute.before — proactive child session discovery for task/delegate-task
chat.message — captures user/assistant turns, routes child messages to child writer
session_tracker.integration_with_task: DEEP — session-tracker is the PRIMARY consumer of native task tool events. It creates child .json files, hierarchy-manifest.json entries, journey entries, and turn records. The task tool is the ONLY tool with dedicated child-session creation logic in tool-capture.ts (handleTask method, lines 228-394).
session_tracker.integration_with_trajectory: NONE — session-tracker does NOT create, update, or reference trajectory records. Trajectory is a separate module (src/task-management/trajectory/) with its own tool (hivemind-trajectory).
session_tracker.integration_with_agent_work_contracts: NONE — session-tracker does NOT create, update, or reference agent work contracts. Contracts are a separate module (src/features/agent-work-contracts/) with its own tool (hivemind-agent-work-create).

differences_from_native_task.dispatch_mechanism: delegate-task uses DelegationManager → DelegationCoordinator → SdkChildSessionStarter (custom v2 pipeline). Native task uses OpenCode's built-in session.prompt() with subtask part.
differences_from_native_task.session_tracker_integration: delegate-task fires through the SAME hooks as native task (tool.execute.before/after). Session-tracker's ToolDelegation.recordChildTaskDelegation() handles BOTH tools — it checks input.tool === 'task' || input.tool === 'delegate-task' at index.ts:312.
differences_from_native_task.delegation_tracking: delegate-task creates a Delegation record in DelegationManager's in-memory Map AND persists to .hivemind/state/delegations.json. Native task has NO DelegationManager record — only session-tracker's child .json file.
differences_from_native_task.completion_detection: delegate-task uses dual-signal CompletionDetector (completion event + terminal status). Native task relies on session.idle event only.
differences_from_native_task.notification: delegate-task sends parent notifications via NotificationRouter + PeriodicNotifier. Native task has no notification system.
differences_from_native_task.stacking: delegate-task supports stackOnSessionId for session reuse. Native task creates a new session every time.
differences_from_native_task.config_gate: delegate-task respects delegation_systems.delegate_task config flag. Native task is always available.
differences_from_native_task.agent_validation: delegate-task validates agent via AgentResolver against OpenCode app registry. Native task delegates validation to OpenCode runtime.

files: src/task-management/trajectory/types.ts — TrajectoryRecord, TrajectoryLedger, TrajectoryCheckpoint, TrajectoryEvent (128 lines)
src/task-management/trajectory/store-operations.ts — inspect, attach, checkpoint, event, close, traverse (190 lines)
operations: inspectTrajectoryLedger — read-only inspection of ledger or single trajectory
attachTrajectoryEvidence — attach evidence refs to trajectory (creates if needed)
eventTrajectory — record evidence event (recovery, handoff, note)
traverseTrajectory — parent-child traversal by root session, session, or trajectory ID
trajectory_module.auto_creation: NONE — trajectories are ONLY created when an agent explicitly calls hivemind-trajectory tool with action 'attach', 'checkpoint', or 'event'. No automatic trajectory creation on task/delegate-task dispatch.

operations: createAgentWorkContract — pressure-aware contract creation with trajectory evidence linking
exportAgentWorkContract — JSON or Markdown handoff payload
findContractsByTrajectory — find all contracts for a trajectory ID
completeContract — running→completed transition with optional proof
cancelContract — any active→cancelled transition with reason
agent_work_contracts_module.auto_creation: NONE — contracts are ONLY created when an agent explicitly calls hivemind-agent-work-create tool. No automatic contract creation on task/delegate-task dispatch.
agent_work_contracts_module.trajectory_integration: Contracts can OPTIONALLY link to a trajectory via trajectoryId field. When provided, createAgentWorkContract calls attachTrajectoryEvidence() to create a bidirectional link.

integration_gap.summary: The native task tool creates rich session-tracker data (child .json, hierarchy-manifest, journey entries, turns) but does NOT create trajectory records or agent-work-contracts. These modules are completely disconnected from the delegation lifecycle.

where_to_hook.option_a_tool_execute_after: In SessionTracker.handleToolExecuteAfter() at index.ts:312-316, after recordChildTaskDelegation() completes. This is the earliest point where we know the child session ID and delegation metadata. We could call trajectory and contract creation here.
where_to_hook.option_b_session_idle: In SessionIdleHandler.handle() at handlers/session-idle-handler.ts:31, after updateChildStatus('completed'). This is when we know the delegation is complete and have the lastMessage.
where_to_hook.option_c_delegation_coordinator: In DelegationCoordinator.handleCompletion() at coordinator.ts:325-333. This is the v2 completion path for delegate-task only. Would NOT cover native task.
where_to_hook.option_d_plugin_hooks: In plugin.ts tool.execute.after handler at line 588-612, after sessionTracker.handleToolExecuteAfter(). This is the outermost hook boundary.

integration_gap.priority: task tool first, delegate-task second — native task is the PRIMARY integration target because it's used more frequently and has richer session-tracker integration

complexity.trajectory_auto_creation: LOW — add 5 lines to ToolDelegation.recordChildTaskDelegation() to call attachTrajectoryEvidence() with session ID as trajectory ID
complexity.contract_auto_creation: MEDIUM — need to decide contract schema defaults (owner, scope, evidence) from delegation metadata. ~20 lines in tool-delegation.ts
complexity.trajectory_event_on_completion: LOW — add eventTrajectory() call in SessionIdleHandler for child sessions. ~5 lines.
complexity.lifecycle_transitions: MEDIUM — need to wire startContract on dispatch, completeContract on idle. ~15 lines across 2 files.

key_files_to_modify: src/features/session-tracker/index.ts — may need to expose projectRoot to ToolDelegation for trajectory/contract calls
